titleStmt.title: The Department of State to the British Embassy

head.hi: The Department of State to the British Embassy

div.p:
The Government of the United States appreciates the action of the British Embassy in communicating in its aide-mémoire of December 27, 1937,
Foreign Relations, 1937, vol. iii, p. 839. the views of the French Government in regard to the desirability of maintaining diplomatic representation in Peiping and the decision of the British Government not to withdraw for the present their diplomatic staffs and Embassy guards from north China.
